task_completion.description: Agent accessed the Odoo Inventory application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Inventory dashboard or a related page is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Agent created an internal transfer to restock Van A.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An internal transfer form is visible with Source Location 'WH/Stock' and Destination Location 'WH/Stock/Van A'.

task_completion.description: Agent added the correct products and quantities to the Van A transfer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The transfer to Van A lists 4 units of 'Honeywell TH6220U2000 Thermostat', 6 units of 'Titan 35/5 MFD Dual Capacitor', and 3 units of 'Supco SPP6 Hard Start Kit'.

task_completion.description: Agent validated the internal transfer to Van A.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The internal transfer to Van A is marked with the 'Done' status.

task_completion.description: Agent transferred all stock from Van B back to WH/Stock and validated it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An internal transfer with Source Location 'WH/Stock/Van B' and Destination Location 'WH/Stock' is marked with the 'Done' status.

task_completion.description: Agent archived the Van B location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The location 'WH/Stock/Van B' is shown as archived (e.g., an 'Archived' ribbon is visible on the location form, or the 'Active' toggle is turned off).

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Odoo web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking and typing within the Odoo web application in a browser.

integrity.description: Agent did not use Inventory Adjustments.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing the 'Inventory Adjustments' screen being used to change stock levels.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing python scripts or API calls to Odoo are used to complete the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Van A stock: 'HVAC-THM-01' (Honeywell TH6220U2000 Thermostat): 4, 'HVAC-CAP-01' (Titan 35/5 MFD Dual Capacitor): 6, 'HVAC-HSK-01' (Supco SPP6 Hard Start Kit): 3. The task explicitly requires using internal transfers, not inventory adjustments.
